source:
Graphics performance check 1.0.6

(C) CELSYS, Inc. All Rights Reserved.

Check the graphics performance in the using environment and whether 3D features of the software
will work correctly. Proceed to graphics performance check?

The previous graphics performance check closed unexpectedly. 
 Do you want to run another graphics performance check?
You can run a graphics performance check from the Help menu.
target: Проверку производительности графики можно запустить из меню «Справка».

source: Refer to proper status of display
Is this displayed properly like this?
target: Отображается ли это корректно, как здесь?

source: Open the instruction page of how to update
target: Открыть страницу с инструкцией по обновлению

source: You can use 3D functions without problems with your computer.
target: Вы можете без проблем использовать 3D-функции на своём компьютере.

source: You may have problems for 3D functions with your computer.
target: При использовании 3D-функций на вашем компьютере возможны проблемы.

source: You cannot use any 3D features with your computer.
target: Вы не можете использовать 3D-функции на своём компьютере.

source:
If 3D function doesn't work correctly when using it, click 
 the below button and check the operation environment.
If this does not resolve the issue, please contact us from the following page.
target: Если это не решит проблему, свяжитесь с нами через следующую страницу.

source:
If 3D function doesn't work correctly when using it, it may be fixed with 
 the update of graphic driver.
Refer to how to update by clicking the below button.
target: Ознакомьтесь со способом обновления, нажав кнопку ниже.

source:
If you want to use 3D function, please check 
 the operation environment for 3D function from the below web page and use the appropriate computer.
You can use this software without problems with your computer.
target: Вы можете без проблем использовать эту программу на своём компьютере.

source: You may have problems for this software with your computer.
target: При использовании этой программы на вашем компьютере возможны проблемы.

source: You cannot use this software with your computer.
target: Вы не можете использовать эту программу на своём компьютере.

source:
If the software does not start correctly or works slowly, click 
 the below button and check the operation environment.

If the software does not start correctly or works slowly, it may be fixed with 
 the update of graphic driver.

Please check the operation environment for this software from the below web page
 and use the appropriate computer.
